item.title: SEED：用于代理强化学习的自我进化在策略蒸馏
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14777v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback.
